title: MCP Toolkit
body:
### Feature request description

Please can we consider adding  an MCP toolkit to podman desktop https://docs.docker.com/ai/mcp-catalog-and-toolkit/toolkit/

### Suggest potential solution

Having the MCP toolkit functionality ported to podman

### Have you considered any alternatives?

I dont want to use docker desktop

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body:
Hi @samhodgkinson 

Could you please open this issue on https://github.com/podman-desktop/podman-desktop
yeah this repo is for the podman cli only so this needs to be reported to the Podman Desktop team instead
